creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 164536
svn diff for security/gnupg1 to update distinfo file

After the upgrade to 1.4.20 there seems to be a problem with the checksum file.  See http://pkg.awarnach.mathstat.dal.ca/data/10amd64-default/2015-12-23_02h03m56s/logs/errors/gnupg1-1.4.20.log.

Attached is an svn diff with a newly generated distinfo file.
